title: AL's Creepers Revamped
description: A pack that revamps Creepers and adds more variants!
body:
![Creepers Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/895459204b1f1b9161e6be6ba1f5de5a979ad49d.png)

# 

A pack that revamps Creepers and adds more variants by changing the textures based on the biome grass colors!
I made this as a more "Modernized-Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oslcpuF-sus" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 
Skins/Variants

***16 Creeper variants**

 
All skins/variants are biome dependent and, since I didn't use a custom model, it has built in compatibility with Fresh Animations!

 
Make sure that these are all set to "**ON**":

**Random Entities**

**Emissive Textures**

You can find these toggles by going into:

**Options>Video Settings>Quality**
